sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36877" key="e)capoptu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαπο-πτύω</orth>, <sense id="n36877.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spit quite out,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9022.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
